response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The vocals phonetically match the provided official Japanese lyrics perfectly. 2. subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいだ
subtitles.english: It's all, it's all your fault

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいにウザったいわ
subtitles.english: You're so annoying it makes me want to throw up

subtitles.original: 何かに縋って 諂って
subtitles.english: Clinging to something, playing the flatterer

subtitles.original: 期待したアタシが馬鹿だった
subtitles.english: I was a fool for expecting anything from you

subtitles.original: ご機嫌伺いの八方美人
subtitles.english: Sycophantic, trying to please everyone

subtitles.original: それ故にアンチな一生gimme
subtitles.english: And that's why you get a lifetime of haters, gimme

subtitles.original: 浅いキャパシティ まいど おおきに
subtitles.english: Shallow capacity, thanks for your business as always

subtitles.original: つまるとこ人生ずっと地味
subtitles.english: Long story short, your life is always going to be plain

subtitles.original: 「憎たらしい！」「痛々しい！」
subtitles.english: 'How hateful!' 'How painful!'

subtitles.original: 無視出来ないのがいっそ
subtitles.english: The fact that I can't ignore it makes it even more...

subtitles.original: 腹立たしい 苛立たしい
subtitles.english: irritating and frustrating

subtitles.original: そろそろ飽きた自画自賛に
subtitles.english: I've about had enough of your self-praise

subtitles.original: ライクの反対はアパシー
subtitles.english: The opposite of like is apathy

subtitles.original: ≒繋がれた証
subtitles.english: Roughly equivalent to a proof of connection

subtitles.original: 切り離せない関係
subtitles.english: An inseparable relationship

subtitles.original: 逸らしてしまいたいわ
subtitles.english: I just want to look away from it

subtitles.original: これは所謂ヘイトスピーチ
subtitles.english: This is what you call hate speech

subtitles.original: 匿名性の声明を生命に載せてんだ
subtitles.english: Delivering an anonymous statement on life itself

subtitles.original: 鳴りやまないサイレン
subtitles.english: A siren that won't stop ringing

subtitles.original: 近づく度に痙攣
subtitles.english: Spasming every time it gets close

subtitles.original: 赤信号にずっと従順です。
subtitles.english: Always obedient to the red light.

subtitles.original: 大体アナタのコト アタシ ダイダイダイダイダイキライ
subtitles.english: Basically, I hate hate hate hate hate everything about you

subtitles.original: omg情けない 最早バイバイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: OMG, how pathetic, I just want to say bye-bye-bye-bye-bye already

subtitles.original: 脳内も予測不能故に 解解解解解は無い
subtitles.english: Even my mind is unpredictable, so there is no, no, no, no solution

subtitles.original: どうだい？アタシのコト アナタ ダイダイダイダイダイキライになった？
subtitles.english: How about you? Have you come to hate hate hate hate hate me?

subtitles.original: あァ百害あって一利ナシ nothing not see
subtitles.english: Ah, absolutely zero benefits, nothing not see

subtitles.original: もしタラレバ並めてもニコチンだし
subtitles.english: Even if I list all the 'what-ifs,' it's just nicotine

subtitles.original: i miss youって近付いた結末は凡ミス凡ミス
subtitles.english: Approaching with an 'I miss you' ended in a silly mistake, silly mistake

subtitles.original: センキュー反面教師
subtitles.english: Thank you, bad role model

subtitles.original: 後味一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: The aftertaste won't go away for the rest of my life

subtitles.original: よしよし いい子ね
subtitles.english: There, there, good child

subtitles.original: 笑顔振り撒きパラパラいい子ね
subtitles.english: Flashing smiles, scatter them around, good child

subtitles.original: だけどだけどその本性は？
subtitles.english: But, but, what is your true nature?

subtitles.original: 善悪の区別も付かないの？笑 はぁ。
subtitles.english: Can't you even tell right from wrong? Haha, *sigh*.

subtitles.original: 減点方式で取り巻く環境に巻かれて
subtitles.english: Swept up by the surrounding environment in a demerit system

subtitles.original: 生涯、痛い！痛い！痛い！も聞かれないわ！って
subtitles.english: My whole life, saying 'It hurts! It hurts! It hurts!' won't even be heard!

subtitles.original: 当然の報いにクラっ ちゃっ た
subtitles.english: Getting dizzy from the natural retribution

subtitles.original: 人は鏡なんです
subtitles.english: People are mirrors

subtitles.original: 実のところ 依存は両辺です
subtitles.english: In fact, dependency is on both sides

subtitles.original: シャットダウンしても付き纏う
subtitles.english: Even if I shut it down, it clings to me

subtitles.original: 己の弱さが不甲斐ない
subtitles.english: My own weakness is so pathetic

subtitles.original: 全部 全部 アンタのせいって
subtitles.english: Saying 'it's all, it's all your fault'

subtitles.original: 反吐が出るくらいに止まんないわ
subtitles.english: It won't stop, to the point of throwing up

subtitles.original: いっその事切り離せた方が楽なのにナ
subtitles.english: It would be much easier if I could just cut it off completely
